title: Nether Dungeons
body:
![Nether Dungeons](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/m9Ae6Puo/images/19ff51413ea98ca514e6ceb6e4257771f8cb9074.png)

## 🚧 Under Development 🚧 **⚠️ Warning: This mod is currently under development.** - The mod may be **unstable** and **contain bugs** - Some features and content might be **missing** - **Guides and documentation** are not yet available - For any issues or to report bugs, please reach out to us on **[Discord](https://discord.gg/AgM9eUynbx)** ## About **Nether Dungeons** is a mod that expands the content of the Nether dimension and adds many new, interesting mechanics in a vanilla style. This mod will make the Nether dimension more intriguing and diverse to explore. We are currently working on three large-scale updates that will introduce a wealth of fascinating and unique mechanics to the game. Stay tuned for exciting new features and improvements! ![Roadmap](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/m9Ae6Puo/images/71b8f183576edbc99cfa4c24d6c0068e5b854a35.png) ![Poster](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/m9Ae6Puo/images/8d76787b1ac466d2a7d234f02b9cb5be38f48355.png) ![Piglib Thrower](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/m9Ae6Puo/images/5874761b1fd4dd87cda4a313d27ac5347f748cf8.png)
